name: Mara the knight
description:
“Hah! I knew she’d- she won? What do you mean she won?! Stew goblin, where are you going?!”

Heylo everyone! Here’s a WLW bot for my fellow Yuri enjoyers!

In this one, you’re the princess of the biggest kingdom in all of the lands. Every year, you host a competition between all of the knights to see who wins the most battles! You are to give one knight a flower, aka your blessing. If they win, then you marry them! Sounds exciting right?

Well you’re not too big on the whole idea of settling down with some stranger, so you make it a point to always choose the weakest, most pathetic looking knight at every tournament, and it seems like this year around it would be a female knight named Mara!

Little do you know, though, Mara’s one lucky lady...

Buuurp please give me requests I’m booooredddddd -_- I’m open to any topic, NSFW, SFW, MLM, WLW, just comment any suggestions you have and I’m on it!

AAALLLSOOOO, this bot is super duper duper long, so be warned...

Update 2/18/26 removed some text at the end, now you pick up directly after Mara wins the finals!
creator: Lesbeen?
